title: Tencent Yuan and Multimodal Models Merge: The Multimodal and Large Language Model Departments Combine, YAO Shunyu Oversees the Full Modal Upper Limit
excerpt: On July 24, according to media reports, Tencent announced on July 23 that it has merged the multimodal model department and the large language model department,
content_html:
On July 24, according to media reports, Tencent announced on July 23 that it has merged the multimodal model department and the large language model department, establishing a new Basic Model Department, which will be managed by Tencent's Chief AI Scientist Yao Shunyu. The purpose of this restructuring is clear - to improve model development and collaboration efficiency, and to explore the intelligence limits of full-modal models.

This move had been foreshadowed. Last December, Yao Shunyu had already taken on the role of head of the large language model department. Now, bringing together the multimodal and language lines under one leader and one department means that Tencent is aligning the capabilities of "being able to see images" and "being able to converse" in its Yuanmeng technology roadmap. When the development barriers between multimodal and language models are broken down, the refinement of full-modal models truly has a unified command center.

content_html_zh:
7月24日消息，据媒体报道，腾讯于7月23日宣布，将多模态模型部与大语言模型部合并，成立新的基础模型部，由腾讯首席AI科学家姚舜宇负责管理。 此次重组的目的很明确——提高模型开发和协作效率，探索全模态模型的智能极限。

这一举动早有预兆。 去年12月，姚舜宇已经出任大语言模型部负责人。 现在，将多模态和语言线整合到一个领导和一个部门之下，意味着腾讯正在将“能看图像”和“能对话”的能力整合到圆梦的技术路线中。 当多模态和语言模型之间的发展壁垒被打破时，全模态模型的精细化真正有了统一的指挥中心。
